front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Ether Sage — the 3rd advancement of the Mnemonist class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: ultimate Mnemonist, pure white and purple hybrid robe, ether crystal patterns on shoulders, massive ether orb (1/3 character size) as primary weapon, five tomes orbiting in circle formation, crown of memories (floating crystal ring) above head, white (#FFFFFF) and ether blue (#89CFF0) added to palette. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
